title: SEO Decision Record
description: Structured record for SEO Scrummaster decisions, debate outcomes, and approval gates.

proposal.description: The proposed SEO action or rule.

counterarguments.description: Key objections, risks, or dissenting agent views.

conditions.description: Conditions attached to approval or revision.

verification.description: How the decision outcome will be verified.

rollback.description: Rollback or reversal plan if the decision causes harm.

examples.proposal: Update canonical logic for localized product pages.
counterarguments: Template-level change can affect many pages.
conditions: International SEO Agent must validate hreflang
examples.verification: Rendered sample pages self-canonicalize and pass hreflang validation.
examples.rollback: Revert template change and redeploy previous canonical logic.
